rulings.Case Title: ANITA LIMBIRD VS. MICHAEL NIGHTINGALE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for November 1, 2011, line 1 - Defendant Michael Nightingale's motion to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss Deny, 5 days to plead, authorized to post and mail. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OWB REO, LLC VS. JUAN A HERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Herlinda Hernandez'S Demurrer To Complaint Of Owb Reo, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Appearances: Herlinda Hernandez defendant in pro per and moving party/ Attorney Robert Cohen for OWB REO LLC, plaintiff and opposing party ARGUED - Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Herlinda Hernandez' demurrer to complaint of OWB, REO, LLC is overruled with 5 days to answer. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported (510/REQ)
